title: Scape and Run: Emissives
description:
Makes things that probably should glow, glow. 
Supports most SRP addons as well.
body:
Makes Certain textures from Scape and Run: Parasites, and related addon mods glow in the dark with Optifine's emissive texture system. doesn't add dynamic lights however, only makes the sprite itself glow.

If I made any visual mistakes in the texture, or want to suggest something be made glowy, message me at the **Official SR:P Discord server**, the invite link can be found on the mod page for Scape and Run: Parasites, as well as here. 

Current Mods affected are the following:

- Hermit's Arsenal
- NoCube's Combat/Survival/Nests Addon(s)
- NoCube Tweaks
- Cotesia Glomerata
- Koolant's SRP Reinforcement Addon
- Scape and Run: Meshi
- Scape and Spartan: Parasites
